title: Balykshi Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Balykshi with a Z-Score of +3.91. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Balykshi has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 8%, exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 7.6 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
